title: Restore previous purple/white theme and fix blank Draft screen

requirements.text: Restore the app’s previous purple-and-white color theme across all screens by reverting any recent theme/token changes and ensuring the UI consistently uses the purple primary accent with white/light surfaces (and appropriate dark-mode equivalents).

quotes: previous purple‑and‑white theme restored ... This is not fixed yet

acceptanceCriteria: In light mode, primary accents (buttons, active nav items, highlights) render in the purple theme and primary surfaces render with a white/very-light background consistent with the prior look.
In dark mode, contrast remains accessible and the purple accent remains the primary highlight color.
No major UI surfaces/components rely on hard-coded colors that override the theme tokens (e.g., background/foreground/primary), preventing the theme from appearing inconsistent page-to-page.

requirements.text: Fix the app’s “Draft” option/screen so it no longer renders an empty/blank page and instead reliably shows meaningful content or a clear empty-state message (in English) when there is no draft data to display.

quotes: Draft option of this Caffeine Al app ... empty/blank

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to the “Draft” option no longer results in a blank/empty screen (no missing content area).
If there is no data to show, the screen renders a visible empty state (title + short guidance text) rather than appearing broken.
If an error occurs while loading draft data, the screen renders a visible error state and a retry or navigation action instead of staying blank.

constraints: Use English for any user-facing text.
Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui or any other frontend immutablePaths.
Backend must remain single-actor (all Motoko logic in backend/main.mo) and only introduce migrations if persistent state changes are required.
nonGoals: Adding new authentication providers beyond Internet Identity/guest mode.
Introducing external databases or third-party backend services.
Redesigning unrelated product flows beyond what is necessary to restore the previous purple/white theme and fix the blank Draft screen.
